positive: A celestial, mystical scene depicting a stylized fox spirit traversing a glowing, autumnal forest. The fox should have vibrant, flowing tails and an elegant, dynamic silhouette. Integrate bioluminescent flora and swirling cosmic dust into the background. Style should be a blend of Japanese ukiyo-e and modern, clean vector art, with strong, defined outlines and deep color saturation. Use a palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, emerald green, and gold accents. Central composition, perfect symmetry, designed for high-contrast apparel print, minimalist background elements allowing the main subject to pop. Full shot, ethereal lighting, clean lines.
